values.name: first_seen
values.description: First admissible public observation of an object by RegistryOps.

values.name: reobserved
values.description: New admissible observation of an unchanged observable state in a later cycle.

values.name: state_changed
values.description: Observation of a changed public state for an already known object.

values.name: withdrawn
values.description: Observation that a previously public state or object is no longer publicly present.

values.name: revoked
values.description: Observation of an explicit public revocation.

values.name: replaced
values.description: Observation that a public state was explicitly replaced by another.

values.name: expired
values.description: Observation that a public state reached its public expiration.

values.name: unreachable
values.description: Observation that the expected public source was unreachable at observation time.
